text: Lakeside Family Dental is open Monday to Thursday 8am to 5pm, Friday 8am to 2pm, and closed weekends. We reserve early-morning and lunchtime slots for working patients.
We're at 240 Lakeside Avenue, Suite 3, with free parking behind the building and a bus stop on the corner. We're wheelchair accessible.

New patients are welcome. Your first visit is a comprehensive exam, X-rays, and a cleaning, and takes about an hour. Please arrive 15 minutes early to complete intake, or fill out forms online ahead of time.

We book exams, cleanings, fillings, crowns, root canals, extractions, whitening, and emergency visits. Cleanings are usually available within a week or two; emergencies are seen same-day when possible.
You can reschedule or cancel up to 24 hours before your appointment at no charge. Cancellations inside 24 hours or no-shows may incur a 50 dollar fee. We send text and email reminders 48 hours ahead.

For a dental emergency like severe pain, swelling, a knocked-out tooth, or a lost crown, call us right away and we'll fit you in the same day. After hours, the voicemail lists the on-call dentist's number.
We accept most major PPO dental plans including Delta Dental, Cigna, MetLife, Aetna, and Guardian. We are out of network for HMO/DMO plans but can still bill them. We are not a Medicaid provider.

We bill your insurance directly and collect only your estimated copay at the visit. If insurance pays less than estimated, you'll get a statement for the balance; if it pays more, we refund the difference.

No insurance? Ask about our in-house membership plan: a flat annual fee covers two cleanings, exams, and X-rays, plus 15 percent off other treatment. We also offer CareCredit financing on treatment over 300 dollars.
A routine cleaning and exam runs about 150 to 250 dollars without insurance; most PPO plans cover preventive visits at 100 percent. New-patient exams with X-rays are around 250 to 350 dollars.

A crown typically runs 1,100 to 1,500 dollars before insurance; most plans cover 50 percent after your deductible. We give a written estimate before any work and never start treatment without your okay.
Tooth-colored fillings run about 200 to 400 dollars depending on size, usually covered 70 to 80 percent by PPO plans. Whitening is 350 dollars in-office or 200 dollars for take-home trays.
We take cash, all major cards, HSA and FSA cards, and CareCredit. Payment for your portion is due at the visit. Balances over 60 days past due may go to our billing office.
Our dentists are Dr. Patel (general and cosmetic), Dr. Nguyen (general and pediatric), and Dr. Okafor (root canals and surgery). You can request a specific dentist when booking.
Cosmetic services include whitening, veneers, bonding, and Invisalign clear aligners. Invisalign consultations are free and include a digital scan and a treatment estimate.
We see children from age one and Dr. Nguyen specializes in pediatric care. Kids' first visits are short and friendly, and we offer sealants and fluoride to prevent cavities.
Nervous about the dentist? We offer nitrous oxide (laughing gas) and oral sedation, plus noise-cancelling headphones. Just tell us and we'll go at your pace.
Switching from another dentist? We can request your records and X-rays with a signed release so you don't repeat recent imaging. Bring a list of any medications and your ID and insurance card.

Billing disputes, insurance appeals, treatment-plan questions, complaints, and anything needing an account change are handled by our care coordinator, who can see the patient's full history, adjust charges, and make decisions the front-desk assistant cannot.
